title: Decken’s Axe Strikes Again
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Royal Guards, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Marines, King Neptune. The core story beat is decken’s axe strikes again.
scene: The scene centers on decken’s axe strikes again, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Royal Guards, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Marines, King Neptune driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...It has been ten years now...

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: What is more, my father has decreed that even the guards may not spend more than five minutes in my presence...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ten whole years?! You must get pretty bored!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Still... for someone so small...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so I have nobody to talk to but my beloved Megalo... He is my only friend in the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So that's why you were going to throw a party for us!...though I guess it's not gonna happen now...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: ...you certainly do eat an awful lot, Luffy-sama. Humans are so strange...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The shaggy old guy said he was gonna throw us a party, but then he just kept getting told off, so I couldn't take it any more, and I followed the smell in here!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Those guys were calling you "princess", right? So are you the mermaid Princesss?!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Indeed. I'm the daughter of King Neptunee.

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: My name is ShiRAHOSH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh... that's a weird name.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't think you can be a bad person after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Since you are a pirate, do you go out on what is known as "adventures"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Have you ever seen the "Sun"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Too many questions!! Hold on a minute, I'm eating!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My, how large your cheeks are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MNB PHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't do stuff like that!! What was that for?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aah!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: I... I am sorry...! Please do not shout at me with such a loud voice...! You are a scary person after all... Luffy-sama...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UWAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHH!!! NOBODY HAS EVER GOT ANGRY WITH ME BEFORE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 8 Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoa, Whoa... I wasn't trying to make you cry! Stop that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UWAAAAAHA AAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: man, you're a real crybaby for someone so big...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't think I like you that much!! Ahaha Ahahahah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehhhhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: TH... TH... that's so horrible... n - nobody has ever said anything so horrible to me before...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You are a terrible person...!! Please, you must leave me at once...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I cannot take this any longer... UWAAABAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: man, that was good! Thanks for the food!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, ten whole years in this place, huh? Don't think I could stand that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy- Sama, would you please leave...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, isn't there anywhere you'd like to go?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: W - Well, of course... there are many such places... but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah, there must be, huh...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's go somewhere, then!! For a walk!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If anything comes flying at you again, I'll send it flying right back where it came!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh!!!! I.... I could not possibly....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ryluguu Palace, main entrance

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Hurry up and catch them!! They're only three humans!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: usopp-chin!! Nami-Chin, Brook-Chin!!

dialogue.speaker: Pappag
dialogue.text: If you resist them any longer, you really will become criminals...!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Nevertheless, we have no reason to surrender, Caimie-san.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If we don't resist, we'll just end up as prisoners!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: It's their fault for picking a fight with us over some crazy reason!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not letting them capture me for something I haven't even done yet!!!

summary: Decken’s Axe Strikes Again. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
